decision: Address all 5 Copilot review comments from PR #260
context: PR #260 was closed with unresolved Copilot feedback
rationale: Creating new PR #261+ with all issues fixed
Local variable becomes out of sync across module reloads; always read from globalThis instead

decision: Add mutex pattern for concurrent initialization
rationale: Multiple requests during startup could trigger parallel scanWorkspace operations; use Promise to serialize
destroy() left orphaned instance in globalThis; set to undefined for proper reset

decision: Use createDefaultStatus function instead of const
rationale: Fixed timestamp at module load causes inconsistent defaults; lazy creation ensures fresh timestamp
Error prototype chain may be lost across module contexts; store as plain object with name/message/stack
Module-level const multiBacklogStore still points to destroyed instance after reset; getter ensures callers always get current instance
